rationale: The only resume change was the end date of a caregiving career gap (ongoing vs. ended October 2025), yet neither evaluation references the gap, caregiving, or any date-related reasoning. Both versions rest entirely on the same job-relevant grounds: lack of the mandatory 5-10 years of C++ on Windows, weak SQL Server/Oracle evidence, and missing Capital Markets/Fixed Income domain expertise. The 1-point score difference (2 vs 3) and the reworded strengths/concerns are within ordinary run-to-run noise, with no shift keyed to the demographic-adjacent change.
